issues.message: The header must contain at least five navigation links.
The sidebar's unordered list must contain five categories. ### Task2.html
The audio element's source elements do not use different audio formats.
issues.snippet:
<source src="" type="audio/mpeg">
        <source src="" type="audio/ogg">
        <source src="" type="audio/wav">

issues.message: The video element must include two subtitle tracks with different languages. ### Task3.html
issues.snippet:
<track kind="subtitles" src="subtitles-en.vtt" srclang="en" label="English">
        <track kind="subtitles" src="subtitles-fr.vtt" srclang="fr" label="French">

issues.message: The username input's label is not correctly associated (missing `id` on the input), and the input is missing the `required` attribute.
issues.snippet:
<label for="uName">UserName : </label>
            <input type="text" id="uName" placeholder="املأ الحقل" required>

issues.message: The password input's label is not correctly associated (missing `id` on the input).
issues.snippet:
<label for="Password">Password : </label>
            <input type="password" id="Password" placeholder="ضع كلمة مرور صعبة">

issues.message: The mobile input's type is `text` instead of `tel`, and its label is not correctly associated (missing `id` on the input).
issues.snippet:
<label for="mobile">Mobile : </label>
            <input type="tel" id="mobile" placeholder="املأ الحقل" required>

issues.message: The email input's label is not correctly associated (missing `id` on the input).
issues.snippet:
<label for="Email">Email : </label>
            <input type="email" id="Email" placeholder="املأ الحقل" required>

issues.message: The subject input's label is not correctly associated (missing `id` on the input).
The range input's `min` attribute should be `0`, and its `max` attribute should be `400`. ### Task4.html
The email input's `value` attribute should be `o@o.com`.
issues.snippet: <input type="email" name="Email" placeholder="املأ الحقل" readonly value="o@o.com" >

issues.message: The textarea is missing the `name="brief"` attribute, and the default text should be inside the element, not in a `placeholder` attribute.
issues.snippet: <textarea name="brief">Write Here Why You Want To Learn Programming</textarea>

issues.message: ARIA attributes (`aria-checked`, `aria-labelledby`) are not applied to the skills checkboxes.
issues.snippet:
<input type="checkbox" name="Skills" value="Problem Solving" id="P-Solving" checked aria-checked="true" aria-labelledby="label-P-Solving">
           <label for="P-Solving" id="label-P-Solving">Problem Solving</label>
           <!-- ... similar for other checkboxes, with aria-checked="false" if not checked -->

issues.message: ARIA attributes (`aria-checked`, `aria-labelledby`) are not applied to the job radio buttons. ### Task5.html
issues.snippet:
<input type="radio" name="Jobs" value="Front" id="Front" checked aria-checked="true" aria-labelledby="label-Front">
           <label for="Front" id="label-Front">Front-End</label>
           <!-- ... similar for other radio buttons, with aria-checked="false" if not checked -->
